title: Package Layout, Pyproject Metadata, Entry Points, and Reproducible Builds · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: An internal Python tools maintainer. They need documented argparse behavior, causal statuses, real temporary-file and subprocess tests, correctness-preserving profiles, canonical package metadata, inspected artifacts, and fresh-environment command evidence. Planned artifact: Deliver Installable Tested Bookbot Release Candidate with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, ca…
objectives: Write task-oriented usage, descriptions, metavariables, defaults, units, examples, exit behavior, and accessibility notes.
Map success, usage error, input error, analysis error, and output error to documented stable statuses.
Test stdout, stderr, status, help, invalid arguments, working directory, and installed entry point as observable CLI behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-bookbot-python cumulative Unicode-safe text-analysis portfolio.

Browser execution uses original fixed in-memory fixtures and deterministic pure-Python models only.
Host files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, package installation, native profiling, load,
operating-system races, publication, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TextPolicy:
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    normalization: str = "NFC"
    casefold: bool = True
    top_k: int = 10


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    corpus_id: str
    revision: str
    policy_version: str
    command_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Bookbot portfolio ready"

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Commit to the mission model · Project Help Contract
steps.instruction:
project case — A project Bookbot team handles case 1627 during an assistive-technology terminal review. Build deterministic Python evidence to build inspected wheel and source artifacts from an identified revision and test a fresh installation; test empty, malformed, Unicode, tied, large, changed-policy, and rejected cases before accepting output; then change LF to CRLF, remove the final newline, and preserve the declared word and line policy. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.title: Bookbot and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Installed Smoke
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: bookbot-installed-smoke-gnqrx8" that uses case 4579 to build inspected wheel and source artifacts from an identified revision and test a fresh installation. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open host files, run processes or Git, install packages, read credentials or host state, publish artifacts, or cause external effects; verify native boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, Unicode 17, disposable files and environments, real CLI and package runs, profiling, accessibility, security, load, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: bookbot-installed-smoke-gnqrx8
# Competency: bookbot-installed-smoke.
# Case 4579: an assistive-technology terminal review.
# Operating constraint: retain source permission, digest purpose, revision, Python, Unicode, policy, command, and output identity.
# Changed case: change LF to CRLF, remove the final newline, and preserve the declared word and line policy.
def evidence_bookbot_installed_smoke_gnqrx8(metadata_fields: int = 9, artifact_count: int = 2, clean_revision: bool = True, contents_inspected: bool = True, fresh_install_passed: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_gnqrx8 = "gnqrx8-8xrqng-4579"
    assert evidence_variant_gnqrx8
    evidence_axes_gnqrx8 = (
        "corpusgnqrx8",
        "policy8xrqng",
        "revision4579",
        "commandgnqrx84579",
        "report8xrqng4579",
        "test4579gnqrx8",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_gnqrx8)) == 6
    if metadata_fields < 6 or artifact_count < 2:
        return False, artifact_count, "package-shape"
    if not clean_revision:
        return False, artifact_count, "dirty-build"
    if not contents_inspected:
        return False, artifact_count, "unknown-contents"
    if not fresh_install_passed:
        return False, artifact_count, "install-failure"
    assert artifact_count >= 2
    return True, metadata_fields, "installable-artifacts"
